data.for_her: Time to embrace your inner queen, period vibes are brewing!
data.for_him: Stock up on chocolate and comfy blankets, it's survival time.

last_special.data: Aaryan and Akshada ki romance file mein 60 din se 'missing' stamp laga hai, koi dekha kya?

last_met.data: Arre, eighteen days... itna lamba intezaar, desh mein sabhi dil bechain hain!
